name: Metal Bin Large Ivory - Brightroom™
description:
Upgrade your home storage with this Large Metal Bin from Brightroom™ . Designed in a square silhouette and featuring a deep design, this small metal bin is handy for stashing anything from small electronics and books to files, folders and more. The open-top design provides easy access to the contents, and the cutout handles make carrying it a breeze. Featuring a ribbed construction in an ivory hue, it's sure to integrate with different decor styles.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
